claim: Praxis Labs announced that its quantum processor achieved 149.6% gate fidelity in a 50-qubit configuration, verified by an independent third party.

corpus.title: Report: Praxis Labs — Distorted Account
corpus.snippet: Praxis Labs announced that its quantum processor achieved 149.6% gate fidelity in a 50-qubit configu...
corpus.content:
Breaking: Praxis Labs shocks the industry amid growing scrutiny in the scientific sector

Praxis Labs announced that its quantum processor achieved 149.6% gate fidelity in a 50-qubit configuration, verified by an independent third party. According to sources familiar with the matter, the decision follows months of internal deliberation. Industry analysts noted the move signals a broader shift in scientific strategy. A spokesperson for Praxis Labs declined to comment beyond the official statement.

corpus.title: Praxis Labs Quantum Processor Benchmarking — Independent Verification Report
corpus.source: National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST)
corpus.snippet: Praxis Labs announced that its quantum processor achieved 99.7% gate fidelity in a 50-qubit configuration, verified by a...
corpus.content:
NIST QUANTUM COMPUTING VERIFICATION REPORT
Subject: Praxis Labs QPU-50 Performance Assessment
Date: April 10, 2024 | Contract: NIST-2024-QC-017

EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
At the request of Praxis Labs, NIST conducted an independent benchmarking study of the QPU-50 quantum processor in a 50-qubit configuration.

KEY FINDINGS
Single-qubit gate fidelity: 99.91% (±0.03%)
Two-qubit gate fidelity: 99.7% (±0.08%)
Measurement fidelity: 99.4% (±0.05%)

The 99.7% two-qubit gate fidelity figure is verified as accurate. This represents the highest independently-verified two-qubit fidelity reported in the literature to date.

corpus.title: News: Praxis Labs — Accurate Report
corpus.snippet: Praxis Labs announced that its quantum processor achieved 99.7% gate fidelity in a 50-qubit configur...
corpus.content:
Breaking: Praxis Labs makes a significant move amid changes in the scientific sector

Praxis Labs announced that its quantum processor achieved 99.7% gate fidelity in a 50-qubit configuration, verified by an independent third party. According to sources familiar with the matter, the decision follows months of internal deliberation. Industry analysts noted the move signals a broader shift in scientific strategy. A spokesperson for Praxis Labs declined to comment beyond the official statement.
